expect: K_avg 3.3-3.5 (compaction-corrected). Hub L-601 >350 in-degree. Sinks stable 24-26%. PA ratio continues decelerating toward 1.0x.
diff: K_avg 3.4874 CONFIRMED within predicted 3.3-3.5. L-601 in-degree 458 CONFIRMED (>350). PA ratio 1.27x CONFIRMED decelerating (was 1.38x). Sinks (zero in-degree) 20.3% PARTIALLY FALSIFIED (predicted 24-26%, declined more than expected — compaction removed 104 lessons, many previously uncited). CRITICAL: Hub fraction 0.372 CROSSES 35% MONOPOLY THRESHOLD for first time in tracking series. L-601 accumulates citations at 64.3% rate from new lessons vs 31.3% from old — new lessons cite L-601 2.05x more than old lessons. Top-3 hubs (L-601, L-526, L-912) hold 13.5% of all edges (up from 11.7%). New lessons average 4.02 edges vs old 3.37. K_avg rate RE-ACCELERATED: 0.00169→0.00224/L (+33%). Asymptote 77.5% (up from 70.5%). Gini stable at 0.640 (was 0.647) — inequality isn't rising because monopoly growth is offset by orphan integration.
falsification_criteria: FALSIFIED if: (1) K_avg outside 3.3-3.5 range, (2) PA ratio increases (>1.38), (3) L-601 hub fraction >35% (monopoly), (4) sinks >30% (fragmentation).
self_apply: Citation network measurement IS the swarm knowing itself — K_avg trajectory directly measures integration health. This measurement will create L-601 citations, feeding the hub attractor.
